requests.name: ⚡ subscription.updated active + cancel_at_period_end=false → ACTIVE
requests.docs:
TEST VIA STRIPE CLI:
  stripe trigger customer.subscription.updated

OR: Subscribe in the portal, then immediately check.

Expect in DB:
  subscription_status = 'ACTIVE'
  stripe_cancel_at_period_end = false
  stripe_current_period_end = [date ~1 month away]
  payment_failed_at = null

UI: Status badge shows 'Active' (green). No cancellation notice.

requests.name: ⚡ subscription.updated cancel_at_period_end=true → ACTIVE + cancellation stored
requests.docs:
TEST VIA STRIPE CUSTOMER PORTAL:
1. Log in as OWNER with ACTIVE subscription.
2. Go to Settings → Billing → Manage subscription.
3. In Stripe Portal: cancel the subscription (choose 'at period end').
4. Stripe fires customer.subscription.updated with cancel_at_period_end=true.

Expect in DB:
  subscription_status = 'ACTIVE'  ← still ACTIVE, not locked
  stripe_cancel_at_period_end = true
  stripe_current_period_end = [end of current billing period]

UI: Status badge shows 'Cancelling' (amber). Cancellation notice with access-until date. 'Manage subscription' still visible.

requests.name: ⚡ subscription.deleted → LOCKED + cancel fields reset
requests.docs:
TEST VIA STRIPE CLI:
  stripe trigger customer.subscription.deleted

OR: Wait for period end after cancel_at_period_end=true — Stripe fires this automatically.

Expect in DB:
  subscription_status = 'LOCKED'
  stripe_cancel_at_period_end = false
  stripe_current_period_end = null

UI: Locked banner shows. Billing tab shows 'Subscribe for £59/month'.

requests.name: ⚡ checkout.session.completed → ACTIVE + cancel fields cleared
requests.docs:
TEST: After LOCKED state, click 'Subscribe for £59/month' and complete test checkout.

Expect in DB:
  subscription_status = 'ACTIVE'
  stripe_cancel_at_period_end = false  ← reset
  stripe_current_period_end = [new period end]
  payment_failed_at = null

UI: No banner, no cancellation notice. Status badge 'Active'.

requests.name: ACTIVE + cancel_at_period_end=true still has full write access
LOCKED (after deletion) cannot write → 403
requests.docs:
PRE-REQUISITE: subscription_status=LOCKED (after subscription.deleted webhook).
Expect 403 + SUBSCRIPTION_LOCKED code.

requests.name: GET /companies/me returns cancel fields
requests.docs:
Confirms the company response includes stripe_cancel_at_period_end and subscription_status.
Note: stripe_customer_id and stripe_subscription_id must NOT be in the response (omitted by findForUser).

requests.name: ENGINEER — Billing tab shows no action buttons
requests.docs:
Sign in as ENGINEER and open Settings → Billing.
Expect: 'Ask the account owner to manage billing.' Only text, no Subscribe or Manage subscription buttons.

requests.name: ⚡ invoice.payment_failed → payment_failed_at set, status unchanged
requests.docs:
TEST VIA STRIPE CLI:
  stripe trigger invoice.payment_failed

Expect:
  subscription_status = ACTIVE (unchanged)
  payment_failed_at = [timestamp]

UI: Payment failed warning box visible. 'Manage subscription' still shown (to allow payment method update).

requests.name: ⚡ Reactivate after cancel_at_period_end via Stripe Portal
requests.docs:
TEST:
1. Cancel at period end via Stripe Portal.
2. Confirm stripe_cancel_at_period_end=true and cancellation notice in UI.
3. Click 'Manage subscription' → Stripe Portal.
4. In portal: click 'Renew plan' or equivalent to reactivate.
5. Stripe fires customer.subscription.updated with cancel_at_period_end=false.

Expect:
  stripe_cancel_at_period_end = false
  subscription_status = ACTIVE

UI: Back to 'Active' badge, no cancellation notice.
